meta.title: Armatis Yachts
meta.description: ARMATIS 107 — an Italian motor yacht engineered for performance, comfort, durability and refined simplicity.

brand.positioning: ARMATIS is an Italian yacht builder focused on creating high-quality motor yachts through a modern and industrial approach to yacht manufacturing.
brand.vision: Our vision is built around in-house production, process control, and sustainable long-term quality. By combining advanced composite technologies, engineering-driven development, and carefully structured production methods, we aim to deliver yachts with consistent build quality and exceptional reliability.
brand.spaces: ARMATIS is also focused on rethinking onboard living spaces. Our yachts are designed to offer exceptional volumes, intelligent layouts, and a new interpretation of comfort and usability — moving beyond conventional standards in their category while maintaining elegant and balanced proportions.
brand.production: Rather than relying only on traditional craftsmanship, ARMATIS is developing a scalable production system designed to maintain the same level of precision, finish, and engineering quality from the first yacht to every yacht that follows.
brand.closing: Based in Italy, ARMATIS combines timeless design, modern engineering, and manufacturing expertise to create yachts that offer performance, comfort, durability, and refined simplicity.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: Designed, Engineered & Built in Italy
vision.body: ARMATIS creates high-quality motor yachts through a modern, industrial approach — advanced composite technologies, engineering-driven development and a scalable production system that holds the same precision, finish and reliability from the first yacht to every yacht that follows.

salon.label: Interiors — Main salon
salon.caption: An open main-deck salon framed by full-height panoramic glazing.

beachclub.label: Interiors — Beach club
beachclub.caption: A sea-level beach club that opens the hull directly to the water.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.intro: Tell us about your enquiry and our team will respond shortly.
contact.gdpr: I agree that ARMATIS may store and process the details above to respond to my enquiry, as set out in the <pp>Privacy Policy</pp>.
contact.success: Thank you — your enquiry has been sent. We will be in touch shortly.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data Protection
privacy.updated: Information notice pursuant to the GDPR

controller.head: Data Controller
controller.body: The data controller is ARMATIS S.R.L., registered office Via Dante 4, 20121 Milan (MI), Italy, VAT no. 14497620964. For any matter relating to your personal data you may contact us at info@armatisyachts.com.

collect.head: Information We Collect
collect.body: When you submit the enquiry form we collect only the data you provide: first name, last name, e-mail address, telephone number (optional), enquiry type and the content of your message. We do not collect special categories of personal data, and the website does not use tracking or advertising cookies.

purpose.head: Purpose & Legal Basis
purpose.body: Your data is processed for the sole purpose of receiving, managing and responding to your enquiry. The legal basis is your consent, freely given when you tick the consent box (Article 6(1)(a) of Regulation (EU) 2016/679, the “GDPR”).

processing.head: Processing & Storage
processing.body: Your enquiry is delivered by e-mail through our processor Resend, and this website is hosted by Vercel; both process data on secure infrastructure, with delivery handled within the European Union. Your data is never sold, rented or shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

retention.head: Data Retention
retention.body: Your personal data is retained only for the time strictly necessary to handle your enquiry and any related correspondence, after which it is deleted or anonymised.

rights.head: Your Rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, rectify, erase or restrict the processing of your data, to object to processing, to data portability, and to withdraw your consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing. You may also lodge a complaint with the Italian Supervisory Authority (Garante per la protezione dei dati personali).

contact.head: Contact
contact.body: To exercise your rights or for any question regarding this notice, please write to info@armatisyachts.com.
